3294320.name: Terry
3294320.description:
Help Terry and his dog survive on their adventure across a charming world of floating islands. Gather, Craft, Build and Battle in a classic RPG adventure to piece together the mystery of how their world fell apart.

Explore Sky Islands

Glide through a charming, handcrafted world of floating islands, each filled with unique landscapes, hidden treasures, and intriguing inhabitants. From lush forests and peaceful meadows to deserts and snowy tundra, every island offers new challenges and rewards.

Gather, Craft, and Build

Live off the land (what's left of it), mine precious materials, and forage for rare ingredients to craft tools, weapons, and supplies. Use your creativity to construct shelters, bridges, and camps - but plan your journey carefully as resources are limited and your journey is long.

Engage in Classic RPG Combat

Battle enemies, from monsters and ancient golems to monstrous beasts that occupy the dungeons in action-packed combat. Choose between melee, magic and ranged weapons to exploit your enemy's weaknesses.

Key Features:

  • Survival: Manage hunger, stamina and health to stay alive.

  • Companionship: Terry's dog is more than a sidekick—any company is good company in a lonely and dangerous world

  • Crafting: Craft tools, weapons and armour to fight stronger enemies.

  • Building: Build camps and shelter as you move between islands to gather new resources.

  • Action-Packed Combat: Battle against enemies in classic RPG combat.

  • RPG Progression: Level up, unlock skills, and customize your character.

  • Dungeon Exploration: Loot challenging dungeons filled with puzzles and treasures.

  • Rich Lore: Immerse yourself in a narrative-driven adventure.

  • Vibrant NPCs: Meet quirky islanders with their own stories, quests, and trades.

Wishlist now and prepare for an adventure!

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
